examples: His hand shook, but it was in exultation rather than in shame.
I felt a tremendous sense of relief and exultation.
He could get up no exultation that was really worthy the name.
Their craggy faces were tilted upward with what struck me as pride, defiance, and, above all, exultation.
For that brief moment of exultation, we get to be Matt Dillon, quietly exultant as we gaze into the distance.
